task:
Implement the frictionless-graph feature for gid-rs. Start with the 3 foundation tasks that have no dependencies:

1. **frictionless-slugify** — `slugify(text) -> String` utility in a new `crates/gid-core/src/slugify.rs` module. Rules: lowercase, replace non-alnum with dash, collapse consecutive dashes, strip leading/trailing dashes, transliterate/strip non-ASCII, empty → "unnamed". Add pub mod + re-export.

2. **frictionless-add-edge-dedup** — `add_edge_dedup()` function in `crates/gid-core/src/graph.rs`. Skips adding edge if (from, to, relation) triple already exists. Edge.relation is String, compare via string equality. Returns bool (true if added, false if already existed).

3. **frictionless-resolve-node** — `resolve_node()` function in `crates/gid-core/src/graph.rs`. 7-tier priority cascade: exact ID → exact title (case-insensitive) → structural segment match (: - /) → word segment match (_) → file path match → title substring → ID substring. Returns Vec<&Node>. Empty vec on zero match. This is the core building block for §3 and §4.

Design doc: `.gid/features/frictionless-graph/design.md`
All tasks are in the graph under `feat-frictionless-graph`.

Include comprehensive unit tests for all 3. For resolve_node, test all 7 tiers + zero match + ambiguous multi-match.
Project location: /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs
